tunnels.name: Lincoln Tunnel
tunnels.notes: Commercial + passenger traffic OK under height. No hazmat. Three tubes. E-ZPass.

tunnels.name: Holland Tunnel
tunnels.notes: No trucks w/ 3+ axles. No hazmat. Tighter lanes than Lincoln.

tunnels.name: Queens-Midtown Tunnel
tunnels.notes: Lowest NYC tunnel. No hazmat. MTA-operated. Clearance tight for rental trucks.

tunnels.name: Hugh L. Carey (Brooklyn-Battery) Tunnel
tunnels.notes: Tallest downtown tunnel. No hazmat. MTA.

tunnels.name: Park Avenue Viaduct (Helmsley Bldg)
tunnels.notes: Bypass around Grand Central Terminal goes through Helmsley (230 Park). Box trucks scrape.

bridges.name: Belt Parkway — Coney Island Overpasses
bridges.notes: Belt Pkwy has some of lowest parkway bridges in NYC. Trucks banned on all parkways but still caught.

bridges.name: Henry Hudson Parkway — Low Bridges
bridges.notes: West Side parkway. Commercial vehicles prohibited. Multiple viaducts around 10'.

bridges.name: FDR Drive — Low Underpasses
bridges.notes: 100% truck prohibition. Multiple on/off ramp overpasses under 10'.

bridges.name: Grand Central Parkway — Low Bridges
bridges.notes: Parkway — trucks banned. Several low pedestrian/rail bridges.

bridges.name: Cross Bay Parkway — Low Bridges
bridges.notes: Rockaway access. Parkway restrictions — cars only.
